case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. VICTOR CORBETT et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORBETT, VICTOR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 467 TURK STREET, #309, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CORBETT, VICTOR DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (DEFAULT ONLY) AS TO DEFENDANT CORBETT, VICTOR
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT (RENTAL AGREEMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CORBETT, VICTOR
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CORBETT, VICTOR
DECLARATION RE: DAILY RENTAL VALUE $5.90 FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CORBETT, VICTOR
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED DEC-03-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CORBETT, VICTOR
